description: A customer wants an item that is out of stock. An associate needs to check if it's available at a nearby store.

nodes.task_description: Identify the product the customer wants by scanning a similar item or looking it up by name.

expected_outcome.value: The associate finds the correct product SKU.

nodes.task_description: Use the inventory lookup tool to check stock levels for that item at other stores.

expected_outcome.value: The tool shows that a nearby store has five units in stock.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer of the nearby store's location and offer to call them to hold the item.

expected_outcome.value: The associate provides a solution for the customer to get the out-of-stock item.
